info.title: myExtBot API
info.description:
REST API for myExtBot — an extensible multi-agent orchestration platform.

All endpoints under `/api/*` require an `x-api-key` header (set `MYEXTBOT_API_KEY` env var, default: `dev-key`).

Interactive docs: `/api-docs` · Raw spec: `/api-docs/json`

get.summary: Get health records for all services
get.description: Returns an array of ServiceHealthRecord for every registered service.

get.summary: Get health record for a single service
Get current status of all agents
Get lifecycle history for all agents

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of history entries to return

get.summary: Get current lifecycle status of an agent

patch.summary: Transition an agent to a new lifecycle status

get.summary: Get lifecycle history for a specific agent

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of history entries to return

get.summary: List all registered pipelines
Get a pipeline by ID

initialInput.description: Initial input data passed to the first step

get.summary: Query cost ledger entries
Get cost summary report
Get per-agent cost breakdown (sorted by cost descending)

200.description: Array of agent cost summaries sorted by cost descending

get.summary: Get per-tool cost breakdown (sorted by cost descending)

200.description: Array of tool cost summaries sorted by cost descending

get.summary: Get the execution lineage graph
get.description: Returns the full lineage graph. Use the `format` parameter to get Mermaid or DOT output.

200.description: Lineage graph in the requested format

get.summary: Get lineage graph as Mermaid flowchart text
Get summary statistics for the lineage graph
List all agent contracts
Get contract for a specific agent

post.summary: Register or replace a contract for an agent

delete.summary: Remove a contract for an agent

post.summary: Pre-check a tool call against an agent's contract (dry run)

get.summary: List all plugins (PluginManager — legacy)
List installed plugins (PluginManager — legacy)
Get details for a single plugin

post.summary: Evaluate all scene triggers against the given context
post.description: Returns a ranked list of matching Scenes (highest score first).

schema.description: TriggerContext — arbitrary key/value pairs describing the current context

200.description: Array of SceneTriggerResult ordered by score descending

post.summary: Get the single best-matching scene for the given context

schema.description: TriggerContext — arbitrary key/value pairs describing the current context

200.description: The best matching scene or null

get.summary: List all registered services
List all tool definitions from enabled services
List all registered scenes
List all registered agents
Route a query to the most relevant agents

parameters.name: topN
parameters.description: Number of top suggestions to return

200.description: Array of agent routing suggestions (sorted by score)

get.summary: Get the single best-matching agent for a query
Get tool definitions available to a specific agent
Get a specific agent by ID

post.summary: Dispatch a tool call as a specific agent
Delegate a tool call from one agent to another

get.summary: Query delegation log entries

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date to query (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to today)

get.summary: List all dates for which delegation log files exist
Get aggregated delegation statistics for a date

post.summary: Install a plugin by ID (PluginManager — legacy)
Install a plugin from a URL (PluginManager — legacy)

get.summary: Get in-memory audit log entries
Basic health check (no auth required)
